evals.prompt: Создай главный экран Command Center с таблицей-переключателем (кампании/товары/фразы) и карточками рекомендаций
evals.expected_output: Complete CommandCenter.tsx React component with: ShopDropdown, MetricCards, QuickStats, RecommendationCards with action buttons, EntityTable with Tabs (Campaigns/Products/Phrases), all using adsIntelligenceApi methods

assertions.text: Uses MUI components (Paper, Table, Tabs, Chip)

evals.prompt: Создай страницу детали товара с табами: конкуренты, SEO-анализ, события изменений
evals.expected_output: Complete ProductDetailPage.tsx with tabs: Overview, Competitors (table), SEO (scores+issues), Events (timeline), Positions

assertions.text: Has 5 tabs: Overview, Competitors, SEO, Events, Positions
Competitors tab shows competitor_title, price, position comparison
SEO tab shows overall_score, title_score, keywords_score
Events tab shows event_type, old_value, new_value, detected_at
Uses getProductCompetitors, getProductSEO, getProductEvents API methods

evals.prompt: Создай страницу настроек со стратегиями автоставок, ключевыми словами и конкурентами
evals.expected_output: Complete SettingsPage.tsx with accordion sections for Strategies, Keywords, Competitors, Exports, Jobs, Thresholds

assertions.text: Has strategy create form with type selection (acos/roas/anti_sliv/dayparting)
Keywords section has collect and cluster buttons
Competitors section has extract from SERP button
Export section allows creating exports for different entity types
Uses getStrategies, getKeywords, getCompetitors API methods
